narrative_seed_by_week.6: Why maths matters — every AI system is built entirely on numbers / Scalars, vectors, matrices — arrows and grids, not equations / A vector as a point in space — music taste described as three numbers / Dot product as similarity — vectors pointing the same direction score high / Embeddings — turning words into vectors that capture meaning / Why ‘king − man + woman ≈ queen’ actually works / Cosine similarity — measuring the angle between two meaning-vectors

lab_activity_seed_by_week.6: TensorFlow Embedding Projector — watch word clusters form in 2D / Rank 5 pre-computed sentence vectors by similarity — by hand first, then verify in the browser / No coding this week — understanding only / Journal Entry #3 / →  Assessment 2 due this week  (see Assessment Plan)
